title: Chibikko Remi to Meiken Kapi
main_page_extract:
Rémi and Capi (ちびっ子レミと名犬カピ, Chibikko Remi to Meiken Kapi; lit. Remi the Little Boy and Capi the Notorious Dog) is a 1970 Japanese animated film.
